title: IT-OT_Integration_PRISMA-ScR_Scoping_Review_Data_95_Studies
author: Ferreira, Verônica
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Data Extraction Records and Analysis from PRISMA-ScR Scoping Review:  IT/OT Integration Architectures and Semantic Interoperability 
 This dataset contains the complete data extraction records from a systematic  scoping review of 95 peer-reviewed studies on IT/OT integration architectures,  conducted following PRISMA-ScR guidelines. The review examined literature  published between 2017–2025 from SCOPUS, IEEE Xplore, and Web of Science. 
 Contents: - Data extraction table: 95 included studies with title, year, DOI, ID and connectivity profile classification - Extracted variables: communication protocols (MQTT, OPC UA, Modbus, EtherCAT),    data flow patterns, semantic mechanisms (AAS, ontologies), and validation approaches - Longitudinal analysis graphs: protocol adoption trends, AAS prevalence,    connectivity profile distribution 
 Keywords: Industry 4.0, IT/OT integration, semantic interoperability, MQTT,  Sparkplug B, Asset Administration Shell, Unified Namespace, scoping review,  PRISMA-ScR
